medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Patient is a ___ with history of cystic fibrosis (delta ___) and severe tracheobronchomalacia s/p tracheobronchoplasty/RLL wedge resection ___ of R/L main stem bronchi with stent removal ___. Course complicated by multiple intubations, recurrent tracheitis, pseudomonal colonization, complicated repeat thoracic surgery on ___ (rotation esophagoplasty, posterior tracheopexy, bilateral posterior bronchopexy) c/b severe dysphagia and aspiration requiring TPN and the placement of a GJ tube c/b necrotizing fasciitis. Patient's symptoms initially improved though there was recrudescence of her respiratory symptoms within 7 months. Flexible bronchoscopy ___ showed recurrent severe TBM in the RMS, BI, and at the angle of the proximal and distal left mainstem bronchus. Patient subsequently underwent bilateral mainstem stenting with clinical improvement, s/p stent removal ___.
